ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_type" TEXT /* Type of the commodity (e.g., Energy, Environmental) */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity (e.g., electricity, gas) */,
  "commodity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the commodity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Categorization of the commodity (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  "emission_factor_co2" REAL /* Emission factor for CO2 in kg CO2 per unit of commodity */,
  "emission_factor_n2o" REAL /* Emission factor for N2O in kg N2O per unit of commodity */,
  "emission_factor_ch4" REAL /* Emission factor for CH4 in kg CH4 per unit of commodity */,
  "heat_rate" REAL /* Heat rate of the commodity in PJ per unit */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the commodity (e.g., PJ, kt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodities_commodity_type FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_type") REFERENCES commodity_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity type */,
  "type_category" TEXT /* Categorization of the commodity type (e.g., energy, environmental, renewable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the commodity was used */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of the commodity used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the quantity used */,
  "usage_location" TEXT /* Location where the commodity was used (e.g., city, country) */,
  "usage_department" TEXT /* Department within the company that used the commodity */,
  "usage_project" TEXT /* Project for which the commodity was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_usage_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department within the company that the user belongs to */,
  "user_permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions granted to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity for which the target is set */,
  "target_year" INTEGER /* Year for which the target is set */,
  "target_emission" REAL /* Target emission reduction for the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_targets_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_emission" REAL /* Total emission for the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_reports_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_type_commodities" (
  "commodity_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity type */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_type_id", "commodity_id")
)
